products.name: Cash ISA
products.description: A tax-free savings account where every penny of interest is protected from tax.

products.name: Open Access Cash ISA
products.description: A flexible, tax-free savings account. Withdraw your money at any time without penalty.

products.name: Simple Saver
products.description: A straightforward savings account with no complicated rules, just a simple way to save.

products.name: 32 Day Notice Account
products.description: Requires 32 days' notice before withdrawal, rewarded with a more competitive interest rate.

products.name: 95 Day Notice Account
products.description: A 95-day notice period for withdrawals, offering a higher rate for money you won't need soon.

products.name: Lifetime ISA
products.description: Save up to £4,000/year and get a 25% government bonus of up to £1,000 free money annually.

products.name: Stocks & Shares ISA
products.description: Invest tax-efficiently in a range of funds, sheltering returns from income and capital gains tax.

products.name: Junior ISA
products.description: A tax-free account for children. Contribute up to £9,000/year towards their financial future.

products.name: General Investment Account
products.description: A flexible investment account with no annual limits, letting you invest beyond your ISA allowance.

products.name: Personal Pension
products.description: Take control of your retirement by tracking your pension and managing investments in one place.
